events.title: That's It, I've Had Enough, I'm Starting My Own Company
events.description: Have you ever thought of starting your own company? Ensure you are going out on your own with all the tools and support possible. We will discuss many of the decisions you need to make when creating a startup, like what type of insurance is needed, should contracts be given to all clients, and I have too much work, what do I do? HOSTED BY: Lansing Regional SmartZone

events.title: PitchMI Championship
events.description: Four teams are advancing to the statewide championship, where they’ll go head-to-head at 517 E&I Week in Greater Lansing for an additional $1 million investment and the title of PitchMI Champion. HOSTED BY: MSU Research Foundation and Michigan Economic Development Corporation (MEDC)

events.title: Innovation Celebration
events.description: This annual event recognizes the vision and impact of MSU faculty, students, researchers, and inventors whose work is shaping solutions to real-world challenges and contributing to Michigan’s economic growth. ​Guests are invited to tour the exhibition space to explore new technologies developed across campus. The program also honors the 2026 awardees in innovation, entrepreneurship, technology transfer, and sponsored research.

events.title: April Happy Hour (ABA)
events.description: Our April Happy Hour on April 8th from 4:30-6:30pm, will be hosted at Gravel Bottom Craft Brewery. Enjoy a relaxed evening of networking, conversation, and community connection in one of Ada’s favorite gathering spots. Whether you’re reconnecting with fellow members or meeting new faces, this casual after-hours event is a great way to stay engaged with the ABA community. We look forward to seeing you on April 8th at Gravel Bottom Craft Brewery.

events.title: Bringing Your Online Business to Life with AI
events.description: Accepting Payments with Stripe: This session focuses on what makes modern digital businesses possible: accepting online payments. After the standard intro to AI development and hosting workflows, we’ll walk through using Stripe’s low-code tools to sell a product, subscription, or event registration. HOSTED BY: Lansing Regional SmartZone

events.title: Innovate State: From Supply Chain to Global Change
events.description: The Innovate State Speaker Series brings emerging and accomplished Spartan entrepreneurs—innovators, builders, creators, and visionaries—to campus for a live, unscripted fireside chat. These 60-minute sessions offer the chance for guests to share their perspectives on a wide array of topics like innovation, startup life, investments, and career paths. HOSTED BY: MSU Burgess Institute for Entrepreneurship & Innovation

events.title: Workshop: Pitch Like A Pro
events.description: Startup Garage event: Workshop: Pitch Like A Pro

events.title: EXIT & ACQUISITION BASICS: Legal Prep Even Early Startups Should Know
events.description: Start preparing for acquisition from day one. Learn what legal diligence involves, what records matter most, and how early-stage decisions can support or hinder a smooth exit process later on. PRESENTER: Joe Morrison (Barnes & Thornburg LLP)

events.title: 2026 Burgess New Venture Challenge
events.description: Burgess New Venture Challenge is the premier pitch competition for student entrepreneurs at Michigan State University. On Thursday, April 9, 2025, as part of 517 Entrepreneurship & Innovation Week , fifteen student semifinalists will participate in a transformational experience to compete for $50,000+ in funding. HOSTED BY: Burgess Institute for Entrepreneurship & Innovation

events.title: June Happy Hour (ABA)
events.description: Mark you calendar for the ABA June Happy Hour on Tuesday, June 10th from 4:30 to 6:30pm at the ABA office. Celebrate the start of summer with fellow members and guests in a relaxed, outdoor setting. This special happy hour is a chance to stop by our office, enjoy the garden-party atmosphere, and connect with the ABA community in a casual, welcoming way.

events.title: Mobility Summit
events.description: This one-day summit brings together researchers, industry partners, and innovators to explore mobility challenges and solutions—from autonomous transit and drones to supply chain resilience and off-road transportation. The program features keynote talks, technology showcases, panel discussions, and opportunities for connection and conversation. CO-HOSTED BY: MSU Research Foundation and MSU Mobility

events.title: Data Science + AI Summit
events.description: Explore how data science and agentic AI are advancing human potential, shaping the future of work, and driving cross-sector innovation. Featuring keynotes, panels, case studies, interactive sessions, and networking to spark intentional partnerships. HOSTED BY: MSU Research Foundation
